stein_elements.initiating_event: Bali conquers heaven, gods lose their abode
stein_elements.goal: Vamana approaches Bali to reclaim heaven for gods
stein_elements.attempt: Vamana asks for three steps of land, Bali grants despite Shukracharya's warning
stein_elements.consequence: Vamana grows into Trivikrama, covers earth and sky in two steps, places third on Bali's head
stein_elements.reaction: Bali surrenders, is blessed by Vishnu, sent to rule Sutala loka

key_objects.name: kamandalu
key_objects.significance: used by Bali to pour water granting gift to Vamana

scenes.description: Vamana arrives at Bali's yajna as dwarf brahmin
Vamana asks Bali for three steps of land
Shukracharya warns Bali not to grant the wish
Bali grants three steps, pours water from kamandalu
Vamana grows into Trivikrama beyond the universe
Trivikrama places third step on Bali's head, blesses him
